evals.name: simple-insert-sql
evals.prompt:
帮我给这段SQL添加详细注释：

set hive.merge.mapredfiles = true;
insert OVERWRITE table yidun_dw.dws_yidun_corp_basic_info_dd PARTITION (pt_d = '${pre_1day}')
select
    clouduserid,
    corpname,
    membershipgrade,
    industry_flag,
    owner_name
from yidun_ods.ods_yidun_corp_info_dd
where pt_d = '${pre_1day}';
evals.expected_output: 生成带完整文件头注释、参数注释、字段行内注释的格式化SQL

assertions.name: has_file_header
assertions.description: 包含完整的文件头注释块
assertions.check: 输出包含 'Author' 和 'Comment' 以及 '【业务说明】'

assertions.name: has_hive_params_comment
assertions.check: hive.merge.mapredfiles 参数上方或同行有中文注释

assertions.name: has_field_comments
assertions.check: clouduserid, corpname 等字段有 '--' 注释

assertions.name: queries_table_structure
assertions.check: 执行过程中调用了 mammoth_client.py 或 get_table

evals.name: join-with-window-function
evals.prompt:
请为以下SQL生成代码注释，需要理解首单逻辑：

select
    t1.clouduserid,
    t2.corpname,
    t3.servicetype_two as first_sku,
    t3.remittime as first_remit_time
from (
    select clouduserid from yidun_dw.dws_yidun_corp_basic_info_dd
    where pt_d = '${pre_1day}'
) t1
inner join (
    select clouduserid, corpname from yidun_dw.dws_yidun_corp_basic_info_dd
    where pt_d = '${pre_1day}'
) t2 on t1.clouduserid = t2.clouduserid
inner join (
    select
        clouduserid,
        servicetype_two,
        remittime,
        row_number() over(partition by clouduserid order by remittime) as rn
    from yidun_dw.dws_yidun_order_info_dd
    where pt_d = '${pre_1day}'
) t3 on t1.clouduserid = t3.clouduserid and t3.rn = 1;
evals.expected_output: 生成带JOIN逻辑注释和窗口函数说明的SQL

assertions.name: has_join_comments
assertions.check: join 关键字附近有 '--' 注释说明关联目的

assertions.name: has_window_function_comment
assertions.description: 窗口函数有详细注释说明排序规则
assertions.check: row_number() 或 over() 有注释说明窗口函数用途

assertions.name: has_subquery_comments
assertions.description: 子查询(t1/t2/t3)有注释说明业务含义
assertions.check: 每个子查询上方有 '--' 注释块

evals.name: cte-with-union
evals.prompt:
帮我格式化这个带CTE和UNION的SQL：

with base_data as (
    select clouduserid, payamount
    from yidun_dw.dws_yidun_order_info_dd
    where pt_d = '${pre_1day}'
    and payamount > 0
),
refund_data as (
    select clouduserid, 0 - refund_amount as payamount
    from yidun_dw.dws_yidun_order_info_dd
    where pt_d = '${pre_1day}'
    and refund_amount > 0
)
select
    clouduserid,
    sum(payamount) as total_amount
from (
    select * from base_data
    union all
    select * from refund_data
) t
group by clouduserid;
evals.expected_output: CTE和UNION部分都有清晰的注释说明

assertions.name: has_cte_comments
assertions.description: 每个CTE(WITH子句)有注释说明用途
assertions.check: base_data 和 refund_data 上方有注释

assertions.name: has_union_comment
assertions.check: union all 附近有注释说明

assertions.name: has_aggregation_comment
assertions.check: group by 或 sum() 有注释说明
